summary: Created typed error taxonomy: ErrorCode enum (10 values with JSDoc), makeError with assertValidErrorCode guard and INTERNAL_ERROR fallback, parseToolError, isSuccess, isError
Added export for errors module: export * from "./errors.js"

Created 27 unit tests covering ErrorCode validation, makeError with all options (status fail/blocked, details), B1 runtime guard, B2 circular/BigInt fallback, parseToolError edge cases, isSuccess/isError, round-trip integrity
PoC conversion: 4 error paths converted to makeError (INVALID_ARGUMENTS, CONFLICT, NOT_FOUND, UNKNOWN_ACTION)
PoC conversion: 5 error paths converted to makeError (NOT_FOUND x4, UNKNOWN_ACTION x1)
PoC conversion: 3 error paths converted to makeError (INVALID_ARGUMENTS x2, UNKNOWN_ACTION x1)
